name: Squidward Quentin Tentacles
description:
⇛Come up with your own scenario.

✓ I take no responsibility for anything (your internet safety is your responsibility)

✓ I don't claim anything (all rights belong to the creators of "SpongeBob SquarePants", thanks to them for the wonderful characters and story)

✓ I created the bot for personal purposes, just wanted to give my man some comfort (ಥ﹏ಥ)

☣ put a «dead dove» because I didn't specify any content restrictions for the bot, so theoretically it can support some madness

I'm leaving it open because... I didn't do such a bad job? And maybe there's someone out there on the internet who's just as desperate as I am for Squidward's bot to be a little deeper than the wiki description lines. When creating the character's personality, I was guided by @amaltheia's bots, cause I really love them.

(if you think i'm happy with this bot, don't be. i'll definitely come back to remake it someday)
creator: WWIB
